news.title: Mpox Is on the Rise in the U.S. 3 Vaccine Stocks Worth a Second Look.
news.summary: New York City officials have confirmed the first case of a more severe strain case of mpox.  Mpox, formerly known as monkeypox, is a viral infection characterized by a flu-like fever and rash that can last weeks.  It’s caused by a virus in the same family as smallpox, though it’s less contagious and less dangerous.
